final:
module T_latch (
    input wire T,          // Toggle input
    input wire clk,       // Clock input
    output reg Q          // Output
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle the output
        end
    end
endmodule
